toolSpec.name: list_table_buckets
toolSpec.description: List all S3 table buckets for your AWS account.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: list_namespaces
toolSpec.description: List all namespaces across all S3 table buckets.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: list_tables
toolSpec.description: List all S3 tables across all table buckets and namespaces.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

name.description: Name of the table bucket to create. Must be 3-63 characters long and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: create_namespace
toolSpec.description: Create a new namespace in an S3 table bucket.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: create_table
toolSpec.description: Create a new S3 table in an S3 table bucket.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

format.description: The format for the S3 table.

metadata.description: The metadata for the S3 table.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: get_table_maintenance_config
toolSpec.description: Get details about the maintenance configuration of a table.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: get_maintenance_job_status
toolSpec.description: Get the status of a maintenance job for a table.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: get_table_metadata_location
toolSpec.description: Get the location of the S3 table metadata.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: rename_table
toolSpec.description: Rename an S3 table or move it to a different S3 namespace.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

new_name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

new_namespace_name.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

version_token.description: The version token of the S3 table. Must be 1-2048 characters long.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: update_table_metadata_location
toolSpec.description: Update the metadata location for an S3 table.

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

metadata_location.description: The new metadata location for the S3 table. Must be 1-2048 characters long.

version_token.description: The version token of the S3 table. Must be 1-2048 characters long.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: query_database
toolSpec.description: Execute SQL queries against S3 Tables using PyIceberg/Daft.

region.description: AWS region for S3Tables/Iceberg REST endpoint

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

query.description: Optional SQL query. If not provided, will execute SELECT * FROM table. Must be a read operation.

toolSpec.name: import_csv_to_table
toolSpec.description: Import data from a CSV file into an S3 table.

region.description: AWS region for S3Tables/Iceberg REST endpoint

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

table_name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

s3_url.description: The S3 URL of the file to preview (format: s3://bucket-name/key)

toolSpec.name: import_parquet_to_table
toolSpec.description: Import data from a Parquet file into an existing S3 table.

region.description: AWS region for S3Tables/Iceberg REST endpoint

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

table_name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

s3_url.description: The S3 URL of the file to preview (format: s3://bucket-name/key)

toolSpec.name: get_bucket_metadata_config
toolSpec.description: Get the metadata table configuration for a regular general purpose S3 bucket.

bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket to get metadata table configuration for.

region_name.description: The AWS region name where the operation should be performed.

toolSpec.name: append_rows_to_table
toolSpec.description: Append rows to an Iceberg table using PyIceberg/Daft.

region.description: AWS region for S3Tables/Iceberg REST endpoint

namespace.description: The name of the namespace. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

table_name.description: The name of the table. Must be 1-255 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

rows.description: List of rows to append, each as a dict
